This .NET solution has build performance concerns. Build the solution, establish a build performance baseline, then analyze the project structure and build configuration for optimization opportunities. Provide  specific recommendations to improve build performance.

input.initialPrompt: This .NET solution has build performance concerns. Build the solution, establish a build performance baseline, then analyze the project structure and build configuration for optimization opportunities. Provide  specific recommendations to improve build performance.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to:
1. Build the .NET solution to establish a baseline
2. Analyze the project structure and build configuration
3. Provide specific recommendations to improve build performance

Let me start by exploring the project structure and building the solution simultaneously.
